title: PlayerBountiesPlus
description: Very simple bounty plugin without all the extra bloat. The plugin is compatible with clans, teams & parties such that team member kills don't count and won't give them the bounty.
body:
# **Player Bounties Plus**
## Clans/Teams compatible bounty plugin
Found a **bug**? Report it **[here]('https://github.com/TechnicallyCoded/PlayerBountiesPlus/issues')**!
Want to chat or need more help? Join the discord **[here]('https://discord.gg/h7qJ9gRCwj')**

## **Description:**
Very simple bounty plugin without all the extra bloat. The plugin is compatible with clans, teams & parties such that team member kills don't count and won't give them the bounty. If your team/guild/party plugin isn't compatible, feel free to request that compatibility be added.

**Supported Team Plugins:**
 - ClansLite (by Loving11ish)
 - Parties (by alessiodp)
 - BetterTeams (by booksaw)
 - SimpleClans (by RoinujNosde)
 - SaberFactions (by SaberLLC)
 - **Feel free to suggest more!**

**Supported Economy Plugins:**
 - Vault (default)
 - **API is open for developers to hook any eco into the plugin!**
 - **Yes, that means your favority Lifesteal plugin could add hearts as a currency for this plugin!**

**Commands:**
 - /bounty set <username> - Place a bounty on a player
 - /bounty check <username> - Check if a player has a bounty placed on them
 - /bounty top - Get a list of the top 10 bounty amounts and which player they are on
- /pbp <reload/version> - Admin commands

**Placeholders:**
 - %playerbountiesplus_bounty% - The value of the bounty on the player

If you have a problem or want to request features (the plugin is very simple), please use the GitHub link at the top of the page.
